description: Theme overhaul with Google Fonts (Inter Tight + Manrope), enhanced color palette, and shared UI components (shimmer, animated widgets, bottom nav shell)
steps: Add google_fonts, shimmer, and animations packages to mobile/pubspec.yaml dependencies

Completely rewrite mobile/lib/core/theme/app_theme.dart to use Inter Tight for body/UI text (textTheme) and Manrope for display/headline text (displayLarge, displayMedium, displaySmall, headlineLarge, headlineMedium, headlineSmall). Apply via GoogleFonts.interTightTextTheme() and GoogleFonts.manropeTextTheme() merged. Enhance the color scheme with richer gradients, proper dark mode slate palette matching the web app.
Create mobile/lib/core/widgets/shimmer_widget.dart - a reusable shimmer loading placeholder widget with configurable shape (box, circle, rectangle) for use across all screens
Create mobile/lib/core/widgets/animated_fade_in.dart - a staggered fade-in + slide-up animation wrapper widget for list items
Create mobile/lib/core/widgets/gradient_card.dart - a reusable gradient card widget with customizable colors for wallet/loyalty/stats cards

Create mobile/lib/core/widgets/bottom_nav_shell.dart - a persistent bottom navigation bar (ScaffoldWithNavBar) with 5 tabs: Home, Categories, Cart (with badge), Orders, Account. Uses GoRouter ShellRoute pattern. Animate the active indicator. Include haptic feedback on tab change.

Update mobile/lib/core/router/app_router.dart to wrap customer routes in a ShellRoute using the new BottomNavShell, add route for /customer/categories, and add page transitions (shared axis for tabs, fade through for modals)
Update mobile/lib/app.dart to use the new theme
acceptance_criteria: pubspec.yaml includes google_fonts, shimmer, and animations packages
app_theme.dart uses Inter Tight for body text and Manrope for display/headline text via Google Fonts
Both light and dark themes are defined with premium emerald + slate palette
ShimmerWidget, AnimatedFadeIn, GradientCard, and BottomNavShell widgets exist and are importable
Bottom navigation has 5 tabs with cart badge support
Customer routes use ShellRoute with bottom nav, delivery routes do not
verification: Check that pubspec.yaml has google_fonts, shimmer, animations in dependencies
Check that app_theme.dart imports google_fonts and applies Inter Tight + Manrope fonts
Check that bottom_nav_shell.dart exists with proper widget structure
Check that app_router.dart uses ShellRoute for customer tabs
Verify all new widget files compile syntactically (no obvious Dart errors)
findings: All steps implemented. Used StatefulShellRoute.indexedStack for bottom nav (GoRouter 14.x pattern). AnimatedBuilder used in animated_fade_in.dart (requires Dart 3.x). App.dart unchanged since it already references AppTheme.light/dark. The bottom_nav_shell cart badge count is hardcoded to 0 and will need to be wired to a cart provider in a later feature.
